title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and Robotics
passage:
What is Artificial Intelligence?

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is when machines can think and learn like humans. AI can help us with many tasks like answering questions or making decisions. For example, when you talk to Siri or Google Assistant, you are using AI.

What is Robotics?

Robotics is the study of robots. Robots are machines that can do work. Some robots can help in factories, and others can help in homes. For example, a vacuum robot cleans your floor.

How do AI and Robotics work together?

AI and robotics often work together. AI helps robots make choices. This makes robots smarter. For example, a robot in a factory can learn to pick up boxes better with AI.

Why are AI and Robotics important?

AI and robotics are important because they can make our lives easier. They can do boring tasks. This gives us more time to do fun things. In the future, they may help us in many new ways.
